businessSummary.oneLiner: Government and commercial AI data analytics platform leader with Gotham (defense), Foundry (enterprise), and AIP (AI platform)
businessSummary.description: Palantir provides data integration, analytics, and AI decision-making platforms for government and commercial organizations. FY2025 revenue $4.48B (+56% YoY), Q4 revenue $1.41B (+70% YoY, all-time high). Monday close $152.72 (+1.17%). AIPCon 9 (3/12) unveiled Sovereign AI OS with NVIDIA. GTC featured president Aki Jain's speech. Yahoo Finance reported the US military is gaining tactical advantages in the Iran war using Palantir software. GE Aerospace AI aviation maintenance partnership advancing.
howTheyMakeMoney: Government contracts (Gotham - defense, intelligence data analytics)
Enterprise AI platform (Foundry - industrial data analytics)
AIP Bootcamps (5-day pilot to enterprise-wide expansion)
keyProducts: Sovereign AI Data Center OS - NVIDIA co-architecture

keyMetrics.name: P/E (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: 9x S&P 500 average (27x), 5.4x software sector average (45x). However, comparable to Datadog (290x) and CrowdStrike (unprofitable) within the cohort

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: 5.5x S&P 500 Forward P/E (21x). GuruFocus GF Value $58.93 signals significant overvaluation

keyMetrics.name: Revenue Growth (YoY)
keyMetrics.interpretation: FY2025 $4.48B. Q4 $1.41B (+70% YoY, all-time high). FY2026 guidance $7.18-7.20B (+61%). US commercial +137%

keyMetrics.name: Operating Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Top-tier among SaaS companies. Q4 GAAP net income $609M

keyMetrics.name: RSI
keyMetrics.interpretation: Neutral. Gradually climbing on Iran war tailwinds and GTC momentum

growthDrivers.title: US Military Gaining Tactical Edge in Iran War Using Palantir Software
growthDrivers.description: Yahoo Finance (3/17): US and allies gaining battlefield advantages through Palantir software in the Iran theater. Combat-validated performance where failure has real consequences.

growthDrivers.title: AIPCon 9: NVIDIA Sovereign AI OS, Targeting $600B Market
growthDrivers.description: Barchart (3/16): Unveiled 'Sovereign AI OS Reference Architecture' with NVIDIA at AIPCon 9 (3/12). Targeting government self-hosted AI data center market.

growthDrivers.title: $1B Defense AI Contract + GE Aerospace AI Partnership
growthDrivers.description: Motley Fool (3/16): Secured $1B defense AI contract. ExecutiveBiz (3/17): GE Aerospace using Palantir AIP for aviation maintenance, supply chain, and customer service automation. Also won DLA AI contract.

growthDrivers.title: GTC President Speech, NemoClaw Partnership Deepening
growthDrivers.description: NVIDIA Blog (3/16): Palantir president Aki Jain spoke at GTC accelerated computing session. NemoClaw announcement strengthens Sovereign AI OS strategic positioning.

growthDrivers.title: Polymarket Sports Betting AI Monitoring, New Revenue Stream
growthDrivers.description: The Block (3/10): Polymarket partnered with Palantir and TWG AI on 'Vergence AI Engine' sports betting integrity platform.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: 20+ year track record in government/defense AI. Security clearance is the ultimate barrier to entry. NVIDIA Sovereign AI + NemoClaw partnership secures position at the center of AI agent ecosystem.

moats.description: Highest security clearance with US DoD and intelligence agencies. Competitors cannot replicate.
Sovereign AI OS + NVIDIA hardware + NemoClaw agent ecosystem. Triple partnership.
5-day intensive pilot converts to enterprise-wide deployment. High conversion rate.

competitors.name: Microsoft (Azure AI)
competitors.detail: Cloud AI platform. General-purpose vs Palantir's specialized analytics

competitors.name: Snowflake
competitors.detail: Data lakehouse. Expanding into analytics platform

competitors.name: C3.ai
competitors.detail: Enterprise AI. Trails Palantir in scale and track record

recentNews.headline: Yahoo Finance: US military gaining tactical advantage in Iran war using Palantir software
recentNews.significance: Combat validation is the most powerful marketing. Palantir emerging as top beneficiary of surging defense AI spending

recentNews.headline: GE Aerospace expands AI aviation maintenance, supply chain, customer service with Palantir AIP
recentNews.significance: ExecutiveBiz: Also won DLA AI contract. AIP penetration expanding from defense to aviation and logistics

recentNews.headline: GTC: Palantir president speech + NVIDIA NemoClaw, AI agent ecosystem centerpiece
recentNews.significance: President-level speech at NVIDIA's biggest event. NemoClaw enhances Sovereign AI OS practicality

recentNews.headline: Motley Fool: $1B defense AI contract secured. Mirae Asset holds $942.7M
recentNews.significance: Single $1B contract. Mirae Asset (Korea) holds $942.7M. Global institutional buying continues

recentNews.headline: AIPCon 9: NVIDIA Sovereign AI OS unveiled, US Navy/SAP/Accenture participating
recentNews.significance: 9th AIPCon unveils turnkey solution for government self-hosted AI data centers

analystOpinions.notableComment: 16 of 28 analysts rate Buy. Consensus $192.68 (+26%). Post Iran war validation and GTC/AIPCon events may trigger target upgrades. Mirae Asset $942.7M holding shows expanding global institutional interest.

risks.title: Extreme valuation at 242x P/E, 116x Forward P/E
risks.description: 5.4x sector median Forward P/E of 21.3x. GuruFocus GF Value $58.93 signals significant overvaluation. Multiple could compress sharply if growth slows.

risks.title: 2026 YTD -14%, down 26% from 52-week high
risks.description: Significantly underperforming S&P 500 (-2.2%). Direct hit from AI bubble concerns and high-valuation stock selloff.

risks.title: Iran war escalation is a double-edged sword
risks.description: Catalyst for surging defense AI demand, but geopolitical uncertainty pressures broader market. Defense premium could evaporate if war ends.

risks.title: Share dilution at +4.67% YoY
risks.description: Stock-based compensation drives ~5% annual dilution. Long-term shareholder value erosion.

risks.title: Big tech AI platform competition
risks.description: Microsoft, Google, Amazon AI platforms intensifying enterprise market push. Could slow commercial revenue growth.

buyReasons.title: Iran War Combat Validation + AIPCon + GTC + $1B Contract
buyReasons.rationale: Yahoo Finance reported combat-proven tactical advantage. Sovereign AI OS, GTC president speech, $1B defense contract, GE Aerospace AI. Growth story continuously strengthening.

buyReasons.title: Q4 Revenue +70% YoY, US Commercial +137% Explosive Growth
buyReasons.rationale: Q4 revenue $1.41B all-time high. TCV $4.26B (+138%). FY2026 guidance $7.2B (+61%).

buyReasons.title: Polymarket AI + GE Aerospace Opens New Markets
buyReasons.rationale: Sports betting integrity, aviation maintenance AI. TAM expanding beyond government/enterprise to fintech and aviation.

buyReasons.title: 47% FCF Margin + Debt-Free Balance Sheet
buyReasons.rationale: Cash $7.18B, debt $229M. 47% FCF margin funds self-sustaining growth.

overallOpinion: Yahoo Finance reported the US military is gaining tactical advantages in the Iran war using Palantir software. Combat validation is the most powerful marketing. AIPCon Sovereign AI OS, GTC president speech, $1B defense contract, and GE Aerospace AI partnerships continue the streak of positive catalysts.
Q4 revenue hit $1.41B (+70%), an all-time high, with US commercial up 137%. Mirae Asset holds $942.7M, reflecting growing global institutional buying.
However, 242x P/E and YTD -14% mean valuation pressure remains. Closed at $152.72, attempting to break through the 50-day ($154). Consensus $193 (+26%). RSI 56, neutral.

investmentVerdict.summary: Iran war combat validation, AIPCon, GTC, $1B defense contract, and GE Aerospace AI provide continuous catalysts. Q4 +70% and +61% guidance partially justify the 242x P/E, but the 5x+ premium to sector median warrants dollar-cost averaging rather than lump-sum entry.

witty.hook: Winning wars is the best sales pitch, and Palantir has it
witty.text:
$PLTR (Mar 17) $152.72 (+1.17%)

Yahoo Finance reported Palantir's tactical advantage in the Iran theater. Four catalysts in one week: AIPCon, GTC, $1B contract, GE Aerospace. That's not a week of news, it's a quarter.

Q4 +70%, US commercial +137%, guidance +61%. P/E 242x seems high until you realize war-critical software doesn't follow business cycles. Mirae Asset put $943M on it.

Testing the 50-day. Consensus $193 (+26%). When the fundamentals are this strong, valuation eventually catches up.

empathy.hook: Down 26% from the highs, but the signals are turning
empathy.text:
$PLTR (Mar 17) $152.72 (+1.17%)

From $208 to $152. YTD -14%. It hasn't been easy. But this week is genuinely different.

Yahoo Finance reporting combat-proven results. AIPCon, GTC, $1B contract, GE Aerospace AI. Even Korean institutional giant Mirae Asset is in for $943M. The momentum is real.

The 50-day ($154) is right there. Up 16% in a month. Consensus $193 (+26%). Dollar-cost averaging is the right approach. The foundation for recovery is being built.
